title: orlaya maritima subsp. bubania
intro: Orlaya maritima subsp. bubania, also known as the Sea Holly or Sea Fennel, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family, Apiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Orlaya maritima subsp. bubania include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestive health, among others. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or a decoction, and can also be used in herbal teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
